# CareCenter for Codex

CareCenter for Codex is an unofficial local Windows tray and CLI utility for
maintaining the OpenAI Codex desktop app installation. It repairs failed
starts, cleans up inactive leftover desktop processes, checks Microsoft Store
package state, and maintains the local Codex SQLite log database without
telemetry or cloud uploads.

Canonical repository: https://github.com/dev-bricks/CareCenter-for-Codex
Default branch: main
Package name: carecenter-for-codex
Python package: codex_logdatenbank_wartung
CLI script: codex-logwartung

Important boundaries:
- This project is unofficial and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or
  sponsored by OpenAI.
- It targets Windows 10/11 and the Codex desktop app.
- It never runs database maintenance while Codex processes are detected.
- It stores config, logs, locks, and backups locally under
  C:\_Local_DEV\codex-maintenance by default.
- It should not manipulate the node-based Codex CLI except through explicit
  read-only/audit paths.

Primary commands:
- python -m codex_logdatenbank_wartung.cli status
- python -m codex_logdatenbank_wartung.cli doctor
- python -m codex_logdatenbank_wartung.cli dry-run
- python -m codex_logdatenbank_wartung.cli maintain --execute
- python -m codex_logdatenbank_wartung.cli repair --dry-run
- python -m codex_logdatenbank_wartung.cli repair --execute
- python -m codex_logdatenbank_wartung.cli auto-maintain --mode safe --execute
- python -m codex_logdatenbank_wartung.cli store-repair --level repair --execute
- python -m codex_logdatenbank_wartung.cli store-materials
- python -m codex_logdatenbank_wartung.cli safe-start-report
- python -m codex_logdatenbank_wartung.cli safe-start-install
- python -m codex_logdatenbank_wartung.cli schedule install --interval-minutes 180

Environment variables:
- CCC_DATA_ROOT: override the default data directory (default: C:\_Local_DEV\codex-maintenance)

Verification:
- python -m compileall -q src tests
- python -m pytest -q

Public documentation:
- README.md: overview, install, usage, safety boundaries
- ARCHITECTURE.md: module structure and safety model
- CHANGELOG.md: release history
- STORE_LISTING.md, PRIVACY_POLICY.md, SUPPORT.md: Store release materials
- SECURITY.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md: community health files

Last-checked: 2026-06-10
